title: malus sphaerocarpa
intro: Malus sphaerocarpa, also known as the Chinese crabapple or Chinese hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant's bark, leaves, and fruit are used in traditional medicine, particularly for their cardiotonic and digestive properties. Malus sphaerocarpa has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including heart palpitations, indigestion, and diarrhea, due to its ability to improve circulation, reduce inflammation, and regulate digestion. Herbal preparations of Malus sphaerocarpa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of the plant's medicinal properties and health benefits.
